message: You know that one friend who always panics when a storm is brewing? Yep, that’s my buddy Jake. Last summer, when the weather report hinted at a hurricane, he called me in a frenzy. "Have you stocked up on supplies? What if the power goes out?" I had to chuckle a bit because I had just spent the weekend organizing my pantry and gathering essentials. It made me realize that while it’s easy to feel overwhelmed by the thought of severe weather, a little prep can go a long way in keeping calm. I reassured Jake with my own plan and offered to help him put together a kit. That simple act turned his panic into preparedness, and we even made a fun day of it! 🌪️ How do you stay calm and ready when storms are on the horizon?
